description_long: This object is a semi-circular wedge of hard cheese, with a pale yellow to off-white color and a slightly matte, powdery surface. The cheese has a uniform, dense appearance with no visible holes or eyes, and the cut surfaces are smooth and even. The outer curved edge shows a subtle variation in color, suggesting a natural rind that is thin and slightly darker than the interior. The flat surfaces are cleanly cut, with a few small specks and a faint granular texture typical of aged cheeses like Parmigiano-Reggiano or Grana Padano. The cheese block is solid and compact, with no visible packaging or branding. It is placed against a plain, white background, with no supporting surface visible.
description: A semi-circular wedge of hard, pale yellow cheese with a smooth cut surface and a thin, slightly darker natural rind. The cheese is dense, uniform, and unbranded.
description_view_0: The cheese is seen from the flat, cut side, showing its semi-circular shape and smooth, pale yellow surface.
description_view_1: A narrow side view reveals the thickness of the cheese wedge and the straight, clean cut of the edge.
description_view_2: The curved rind side is visible, displaying a slightly darker, natural rind with subtle color variations.
description_view_3: The opposite narrow side, similar to view 1, shows the thickness and a bit of the rind's texture.
attribute_rind_appearance: The rind is thin, slightly darker than the interior, with a matte, powdery texture and subtle color variations.
